---
title: "Home"
---

<div class="hero">

# Briana Maximino  
### Marketing Strategy & Sports Marketing Portfolio  

I develop marketing strategies that strengthen brand connection, enhance consumer engagement, and support long-term brand growth.

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="projects.html" class="btn-primary">View Marketing Projects</a>
<a href="resume.html" class="btn-secondary">View Resume</a>
</div>

</div>

---

## Strategic Focus  

My work focuses on understanding how brands build meaningful relationships with audiences through strategy, data, and experience-driven marketing initiatives.

Key interest areas include:

- Sports Marketing  
- Brand Strategy  
- Consumer Behavior  
- Campaign Development  
- Digital Engagement  

---

## Core Skills  

- Marketing Strategy  
- Consumer Insights  
- Campaign Planning  
- Brand Positioning  
- Market Research  
- Social Media Strategy  
- Google Analytics (GA4)  
- Excel Data Analysis  

---

## Featured Work  

This portfolio highlights academic and applied marketing projects focused on strategic analysis, brand engagement, and experiential marketing concepts.

---

*This portfolio represents ongoing academic and professional development in marketing strategy and consumer engagement.*
